pages.text: 春天到了，阳光暖暖的。Sam爸爸和Tina妈妈带着咘咘来到郊外露营。绿油油的草地上，铺着一块格子野餐布。
pages.text_en: Spring has arrived, warm and sunny. Dad Sam and Mom Tina took Bubu camping in the countryside. A checkered picnic blanket was spread on the lush green grass.

pages.text: "哇！好多好多小花呀！"咘咘看到草地上开满了五颜六色的野花，开心地蹦蹦跳跳。
pages.text_en: "Wow! So many little flowers!" Bubu saw colorful wildflowers blooming all over the meadow and hopped around happily.

pages.text: 咘咘发现了一朵毛茸茸的蒲公英。她鼓起腮帮子，"呼——"蒲公英的小伞兵飞上了蓝蓝的天空。
pages.text_en: Bubu found a fluffy dandelion. She puffed up her cheeks and blew — "Whooo!" The little dandelion seeds floated up into the blue sky.

pages.text: "嗡嗡嗡——"一只小蜜蜂飞过来，停在一朵黄色的花上。咘咘蹲下来，睁大眼睛看蜜蜂采蜜。
pages.text_en: "Buzz buzz buzz—" A little bee flew over and landed on a yellow flower. Bubu crouched down, watching the bee collect nectar with wide eyes.

pages.text: "小蜜蜂好可爱呀！我想摸摸它！"咘咘伸出小手，慢慢靠近蜜蜂。
pages.text_en: "The little bee is so cute! I want to touch it!" Bubu reached out her little hand, slowly moving closer to the bee.

pages.text: "咘咘，不可以！"Sam爸爸轻轻拉住了咘咘的手。"蜜蜂屁股上有一根小针，被蛰到会很疼很疼的哦。"
pages.text_en: "Bubu, no!" Dad Sam gently held Bubu's hand back. "Bees have a little stinger. If it stings you, it will hurt a lot!"

pages.text: 咘咘又看到地上有一群小蚂蚁，排着长长的队伍搬运食物。"哇，小蚂蚁好厉害呀！"
pages.text_en: Then Bubu spotted a line of little ants on the ground, marching in a long line carrying food. "Wow, the little ants are so amazing!"

pages.text: 咘咘又想伸手去碰小蚂蚁。Tina妈妈蹲下来说："宝贝，小蚂蚁也会咬人哦，手上会起一个大包包，又痒又疼。"
pages.text_en: Bubu wanted to touch the ants too. Mom Tina crouched down and said: "Sweetie, ants can bite too. You'll get a big itchy bump on your hand."

pages.text: 咘咘缩回小手，认真地点点头："我知道啦！小花和小动物，只能用眼睛看，不能用手碰！"
pages.text_en: Bubu pulled her hand back and nodded seriously: "I understand! We can look at flowers and little animals with our eyes, but we shouldn't touch them!"

pages.text: Sam爸爸竖起大拇指："咘咘真棒！学会了用眼睛欣赏大自然。"咘咘开心地笑了。
pages.text_en: Dad Sam gave a thumbs up: "Great job Bubu! You learned to appreciate nature with your eyes." Bubu smiled happily.

pages.text: 傍晚，一家人坐在野餐布上，看着夕阳。咘咘依偎在爸爸妈妈中间，心里想：大自然真美呀，我要好好爱护它。
pages.text_en: In the evening, the family sat on the picnic blanket watching the sunset. Bubu snuggled between Mom and Dad, thinking: Nature is so beautiful, I want to take good care of it.
